since_last: 39% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.85%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC -0.05% · Gold +0.01% · Nasdaq100 -1.42%. 39% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.85%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.85%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -9.98%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +9.74%, DDOG +4.81%, PLTR +4.45%, WDAY +4.34%, NOW +4.32%. Laggards: TER -9.98%, INTC -9.56%, AMBA -8.59%, MRVL -8.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.45% at $151.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
